name: Pressure Chicken Stock M&m
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe chicken pieces with a damp cloth and dry.
2. Place the chicken in the pressure cooker and add water (at least 2 quarts).
3. Add salt, onion, and carrot to the chicken.
4. Add celery.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then skim off any foam or impurities.
6. Cover the cooker and set the control at high heat.
7. Cook until pressure is reached.
8. Reduce the heat and cook for 15 minutes.
9. Allow the cooker to cool naturally.
10. Place the chicken under running water to cool completely before removing from the cooker.
